response.justification: Bogdan is a capable full-stack engineer with strong TypeScript/Node.js credentials, but he fails to meet virtually every mandatory requirement for this role. His C++ exposure amounts to roughly six months at National Instruments in 2014–2015 and a bachelor-thesis project — far short of the 5–10 years required — and there is no evidence of Windows-platform C++ development. His database work centers on MongoDB with only generic SQL listed as a skill; no SQL Server or Oracle experience is demonstrated. Most critically, he has no fixed-income, capital-markets, or investment-banking domain knowledge: the RIDE Capital stint involved fintech practices (TDD, Node.js) but not the specialized capital-markets systems this role demands.
strengths: Solid software-craftsmanship foundation — TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and pairing are consistent themes across multiple roles
Polyglot breadth (DLang, Java, TypeScript, some C/C++, Swift) shows adaptability to unfamiliar languages
Some financial-sector adjacency through the RIDE Capital role, demonstrating ability to work in regulated, delivery-focused environments
concerns: C++ experience is minimal (~6 months at NI in 2014–2015 plus a thesis project) and shows no Windows-platform work — the single most critical requirement is unmet
No SQL Server or Oracle exposure; primary database experience is MongoDB, with generic SQL listed but not substantiated at depth
Zero fixed-income, fixed-income derivatives, or capital-markets domain knowledge anywhere in the employment history
